description_long: This is a vintage-style coupe car with a matte black body and exposed engine components, reminiscent of classic hot rods. The front features a prominent chrome grille, large round headlights, and a powerful V8 engine with visible red cylinder heads and a silver air intake. The cabin is compact, with a single row of seating and two doors, while the rear bed is finished with wooden planks and contains two cylindrical fuel tanks. The wheels are metallic with visible lug nuts, and the rear fenders are slightly flared, giving the car a muscular stance. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, blending metal, wood, and rubber elements for a rugged, retro appearance.
description: A vintage hot rod coupe car with a matte black body, exposed V8 engine, and a wooden rear bed with fuel tanks. The design combines metal, wood, and rubber for a classic, rugged look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the exposed V8 engine, chrome grille, and large round headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the engine, compact cabin, and wooden rear bed with cylindrical tanks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden bed, dual fuel tanks, and wide rear fenders.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the engine, cabin, and rear bed details.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
